notes: delivery_depends_on is the planning dependency consumed by downstream release planning.
runtime_collaboration_refs captures bidirectional runtime interactions that must not be mistaken for scheduling cycles.

feat_entries.rationale: Gateway delivery is planned after path-policy freeze. Registry interaction is treated as runtime collaboration and downstream integration, not as a release-level prerequisite cycle.
Path policy is the lowest-level governance base in this release scope.
Registry registration depends on the gateway operation surface and validated target path semantics.
Audit enforcement consumes gateway, path-policy, and registry evidence.
External gate and materialization are the downstream aggregation slice.
